items.title: Hinkle Fieldhouse lands 2026 NBA Cup championship game
items.body_excerpt: Hinkle Fieldhouse has hosted basketball games at all levels. Hinkle Fieldhouse has hosted high school and college championship games, so why not add the NBA to the mix? Now it will. The historic gym, on the campus of Butler University, will host the Emirates NBA Cup 2026…

items.title: LeBron has to go back to Cleveland

items.title: Freddy Adieu: The Mystery of FreddyLA7 and Why He Was Driven Off X
items.body_excerpt: Famous German soccer fan FreddyLA7, who became a Twitter/X sensation with his cheery exploration of Americana during this World Cup, has apparently been bullied off the platform . It was a meteoric rise that reached an abrupt conclusion following Germany’s shocking elimination…
